properties.htmlText: Use the mobileAllowedOrientations function to find a list of the currently allowed orientations.
properties.name: overview

properties.htmlText:
The mobileAllowedOrientations function returns a comma delimited list including at least one of:

…#9;* portrait

…#9;* portrait upside down

…#9;* landscape left

…#9;* landscape right
properties.name: value
